title: Arlo White (Hypnotic Turtle)
role_summary: 2023 CRFW Fund nominee — described as "in 4th place or so" with "more support — a bit — than the others"; outcome unconfirmed.
body:
# Arlo White (Hypnotic Turtle)

Performs/operates as **Hypnotic Turtle**. One of the four 2023-cycle CRFW Fund candidates. Email summary placed him "in '4th' place or so" with marginally more outside support than the other three nominees. Whether he was awarded a grant is not recorded in the August 2023 email — likely no, given Marcos Garibay was the cycle's primary recommendation.

## Source

- Gmail thread `189f5e407e08005a` — "Fwd: CRFW Fund - Grant Cycle" (August 2023)
